commands.review_summary:
Threads an already loaded plugin metadata snapshot through provider hook/runtime plugin lookup during external-auth profile resolution.

PR surface: Source +6. Total +6 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main loads a snapshot and, when external-auth plugin ids are present, calls resolveProviderPluginsForHooks without forwarding it; downstream resolver otherwise loads another snapshot. I did not run a live sandbox/provider-auth repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs contributor-supplied proof from a real external-auth provider path plus maintainer acceptance; ClawSweeper should not automate around the external PR proof gate.
